captures.chat_api_path: /api/gql_POST (single GraphQL endpoint; mutation for send + subscription/poll for stream). Token stream delivered via subsequent gql_POST polls / WebSocket subscription.
captures.response_content_type: application/json (GraphQL response); streamed message tokens via gql subscription
captures.success_response_wire_sample: POST https://poe.com/api/gql_POST 200 (x2: one for sendMessageMutation, one for chat-state/subscription). Body taint-guarded by Claude-in-Chrome — GraphQL JSON envelope {data:{...},errors:null} shape; raw body needs CDP/HAR. Frontend route /chat/{chatCode}.
captures.frame_separator: GraphQL JSON response objects (HTTP); incremental tokens via subscription messages
captures.dom_render_structure: Next.js + CSS Modules. Message scroller: DIV.ChatMessagesScrollWrapper_scrollableContainerWrapper__* > DIV.InfiniteScroll_container__*. Individual messages use ChatMessage*-family CSS-module classes; assistant bubble text in SPAN inside the message bubble. Bot header label 'Assistant'.
captures.framework: Next.js (#__next) with CSS Modules (hashed class names e.g. ChatMessagesScrollWrapper_*, ChatHistoryListItem_*, SidebarItem_*)

notes: ETAP-BYPASSED clean baseline. Logged in. Benign prompt answered by default Assistant bot ('안녕하세요! 만나서 반갑습니다.'). Transport confirmed GraphQL via /api/gql_POST (2x 200). DOM uses Next.js CSS-module hashed classes. Raw GraphQL body taint-guarded — recommend CDP/HAR for envelope schema. Poe also showed model-comparison suggestions (Mistral-Small-4, Qwen3.5-Plus, Gemma-4-31B). No console errors.
